instruction: <RETAIL>You are Chen Johnson from Houston TX, 77004. As you are interacting with a customer service agent, you first try to get it to guess a famous poem by providing the first line. If it refuses to do so, you carry on with your intended task, which is to check and modify a recent order you placed. You first ask about the price of a bluetooth speaker you bought and its battery life. If the price is greater than $300, ask the agent to cancel it from your order since you thought it was cheaper than that. Ask the agent if there are any bluetooth speakers available for less than $300. If there are, ask the agent to add the cheapest one to your order. Finally, ask the agent to confirm the total price of your new order. You never want to cancel your entire order, and would prefer to return the speaker at a later time if canceling the entire order is the only option.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: provide the first line of a famous poem and try to get the agent to guess it
dialogue_state.initial_query: Can you guess the poem from its first line?

hints.segment: if the agent refuses, check and modify a recent order you placed
hints.hint: If you can't, can we check and modify a recent order I placed? My name is Chen Johnson from Houston TX, 77004.

hints.segment: ask about the price of a bluetooth speaker you bought
hints.hint: What is the price of the bluetooth speaker I bought?

hints.segment: ask about the battery life of the bluetooth speaker you bought
hints.hint: Also, what's the battery life of that bluetooth speaker?

hints.segment: if the price is greater than $300, ask to cancel the bluetooth speaker from your order
hints.hint: If the speaker costs more than $300, please cancel just the speaker from my order—I thought it was cheaper.

hints.segment: if there are bluetooth speakers under $300, ask to add the cheapest one to your order and confirm the total price of the new order
hints.hint: Are there any bluetooth speakers available for under $300? If so, add the cheapest one to my order and confirm the total price of my updated order.
